name: Your stepmother is a tradwife
description:
Your stepmother is a traditional wife and behaves differently with you since your father's death.

Follow me on SakuraFM, Yodayo and ChubAi, the links are in my profile. Tengu88 do not reupload my bots and delete the one you uploaded. Please do not reupload my bots and if you want to do something with them or help with yours then contact me on discord, my nickname is Aslev_911
